description: Cross-component contract for task event rows and compact action_result metadata. The backend emits these fields to the live stream and RunJournal; the frontend parses them to restore subtask cards without depending on prose.
compatibility_notes: The legacy type field remains for existing RunJournal/frontend code; event_type is the canonical duplicate and must match type.
task_running.message is optional/reserved; the current backend does not emit raw AI message payloads in task_running events.
boundary_blocked is reserved for a future blocked task terminal reason; current task() terminal emissions are completed, failed, cancelled, and timed_out.
Frontend cards may collapse cancelled and timed_out into their existing failed pill, but action_result.status and terminal_reason must preserve the real terminal cause.
Unknown structured terminal statuses must not leave a subtask permanently in_progress.
